title: YOZ-247 Black market business Earn money with your body! The end of a woman who was addicted to repayment hell - Yukari Todo
overview: Debt due to one's own spending habits. A woman borrows a man's money in her own name. Acquaintances and relatives became joint guarantors, but the debts they shouldered. Pathetic women who had to fall into the manners and customs for various reasons such as to pay tribute to men. Every day she gives her body to strangers and earns rewards...A reality that she doesn't want to face at first will eventually become a habit and she won't feel anything... [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
